author: punkyard
description: Yearly linear calendar plugin for Obsidian, designed for long-horizon planning - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: punkyard
manifest.description: Yearly linear calendar designed for long-horizon planning.
manifest.name: Lindar

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* docs: split README into docs/, add early-dev warning, complete changelog by @punkyard in https://github.com/punkyard/obsidian-lindar/pull/37
* fix: allow empty motto, hide motto div when empty by @punkyard in https://github.com/punkyard/obsidian-lindar/pull/39
* docs: clarify event lanes setting description by @punkyard in https://github.com/punkyard/obsidian-lindar/pull/41
* fix: clarify 0 value description for lanes setting by @punkyard in https://github.com/punkyard/obsidian-lindar/pull/43
* Rename command to 'Open Lindar', suggest hotkey in README by @punkyard in https://github.com/punkyard/obsidian-lindar/pull/45
* Wrap participants in [[wikilinks]] on save, strip for display by @punkyard in https://github.com/punkyard/obsidian-lindar/pull/47


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/punkyard/obsidian-lindar/compare/0.1.9...0.1.10

releases.author: punkyard
releases.description:
Open note button in event modal, cmd+click to open note, open btn alignment fix

## What's Changed
* Weekend bg visibility, Wednesday highlight, UI polish (#25) by @punkyard in https://github.com/punkyard/obsidian-lindar/pull/26
* Rename notes to description — CalDAV unification, avoid Obsidian notes confusion by @punkyard in https://github.com/punkyard/obsidian-lindar/pull/30
* Add Open note button in event modal, fix version to 0.1.9 by @punkyard in https://github.com/punkyard/obsidian-lindar/pull/31
* Cmd+click on calendar event opens note file by @punkyard in https://github.com/punkyard/obsidian-lindar/pull/34


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/punkyard/obsidian-lindar/compare/0.1.8...0.1.9
